name: Big Sur
description: Big Sur by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Big Sur was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Carmel
description: Carmel by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Carmel was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Wind and surf in this small resort town! Scents of Oak moss and Juniper Berry from the coast of California make up this beachy fragrance!

name: Filoli Rose
description: Filoli Rose by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral Aquatic fragrance for women. Filoli Rose was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Haight & Ashbury
description: Haight & Ashbury by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Haight & Ashbury was launched in 2011. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Haight & Ashbury has recently been named the Best Natural Perfume of 2011 by Donna Hathaway (Portland Examiner). Haight & Ashbury will evoke the era of Love & Peace and the Summer Of Love. This fun fragrance was created for the Patchouli Project Event sponsored by the Perfumer Pharmer Blog.

name: HOLLY wOUD & VINE
description: HOLLY wOUD & VINE by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Woody Chypre fragrance for women and men. HOLLY wOUD & VINE was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top notes are Bitter Orange, Mimosa and Tomato Leaf; middle notes are Violet Leaf, Jasmine Sambac and Neroli; base notes are Galbanum, Agarwood (Oud) and Fir.

name: Napa
description: Napa by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Napa was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: La Isla del Sol
description: La Isla del Sol by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. La Isla del Sol was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. A walk on a sunlight beach, the waves crashing as you stroll by, the mist of the ocean softly sprays your face, the day is just perfect! La Isla del Sol Perfume is a vacation for the senses. Bathe yourself in an Oriental, Orange Blossom, Honey and Bergamot mist and when you do, no matter where you are, the Sun is always shining! La Isla del Sol Perfume received the San Francisco Fragrance Competition 2013 Silver Award for the most seductive fragrance.

name: Morning Mist
description: Morning Mist by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Morning Mist was launched in 2009. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: SkyDancer
description: SkyDancer by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic Fougere fragrance for men. SkyDancer was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top notes are Saffron, Cashmeran, Virginia Cedar, Pink Pepper and Bergamot; middle notes are Osmanthus, Saffron, Iris and Frangipani; base notes are Amber, Musk and Sandalwood.

name: Summer
description: Summer by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Summer was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Summer Varies
description: Summer Varies by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Summer Varies was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top note is Citruses; middle note is Ylang-Ylang; base notes are Vanilla and Olibanum.

name: Verde Perfume
description: Verde Perfume by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral Green fragrance for women. Verde Perfume was launched in 2014. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top notes are Mint, Bergamot, Lemon and Mimosa; middle notes are Jasmine Sambac, Rose and Yuzu; base note is Galbanum.

name: Bellini Perfume Oil
description: Bellini Perfume Oil by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic Fruity fragrance for women and men. Bellini Perfume Oil was launched in 2015. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Bellini Perfume is as fresh as a Georgia peach and as effervescent as Champagne! Bellini Perfume Oil by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic Fruity fragrance for women and men. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. The fragrance features peach, peach blossom, musk, sandalwood, green tea, heliotrope, gardenia, jasmine, ylang-ylang, bergamot, rose, apricot and lily-of-the-valley.

name: Ginger Spice
description: Ginger Spice by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic Spicy fragrance for women and men. Ginger Spice was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. And everything nice, that is what Ginger Spice is made of! The newest fragrance in the Delights line of perfumes is also a little naughty too. Ginger Spice is the blending of various citrus essential oils, the warmth of amber & woods essences with a kick of ginger gives this perfume an edgy but sensual fragrance. Ginger Spice by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic Spicy fragrance for women and men. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. The fragrance features citruses, amber, woody notes and ginger.

name: Lemon Ice
description: Lemon Ice by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Citrus Gourmand fragrance for women and men. Lemon Ice was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Mojitos

name: Orange Spice
description: Orange Spice by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Orange Spice was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Infused with a blend of orange, vanilla, and a kick of clove, Orange Spice is a sassy and delightful fragrance that ensures that your friends will ask you what you're wearing! Orange Spice by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. The fragrance features orange, vanilla and cloves.

name: Pink Pamplemousse
description: Pink Pamplemousse by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Pink Pamplemousse was launched in 2008. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Tea and Lemon
description: Tea and Lemon by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Citrus Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Tea and Lemon was launched in 2009. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Dreams and Visions
description: Dreams and Visions by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Chypre Floral fragrance for women and men. Dreams and Visions was launched in 2011. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top note is Mimosa; middle notes are Cassis and Rose; base notes are Sandalwood and Patchouli. This special fragrance and Winner of the Perfume Pharmer's Best of 2011 Perfumes, Dreams & Visions, was created especially for the Midsummer's Night Dream Event this past summer. The inspiration for this glorious fragrance was Sweet Robin Goodfellow better know to Shakespeare lovers as Puck. Dreams & Vision Perfume is mischievous fragrance, perfect for a midsummer night or anytime.

name: Flowers
description: Flowers by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women. Flowers was launched in 2009. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Honeysuckle Rose
description: Honeysuckle Rose by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women. Honeysuckle Rose was launched in 2010. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: LACE Perfume
description: LACE Perfume by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. LACE Perfume was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top notes are Lemon, Mint and Bergamot; middle notes are Nutmeg, White Ginger Lily, Geranium and Lavender; base notes are Vetiver, Labdanum and Cloves. LACE Perfume is the perfect scent for Spring, fresh clean and light, like a new awakening! Earl & Lady Grey Teas are tinctured with fresh Mint which is then blended in Lavender Perfumers Cane Alcohol creating LACE Perfume's fresh spicy citrus fragrance. LACE Perfume received the 2013 Silver Award for the best overall artisan perfume in the San Francisco Fragrance Competition. LACE Perfume by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. LACE Perfume was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. Top notes are lemon, mint and bergamot; middle notes are nutmeg, white ginger lily, geranium and lavender; base notes are vetiver, labdanum and cloves.

name: Lavender and Roses
description: Lavender and Roses by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Aromatic fragrance for women and men. Lavender and Roses was launched in 2011. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.

name: Lavender Fields

name: Summer Afternoon
description: Summer Afternoon by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women and men. Summer Afternoon was launched in 2015. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. SUMMER AFTERNOON PERFUME, is the recipient of the 2015 Summer Challenge Gold Award. Sponsored by Lyn Ayer of Coeur d'Esprit Natural Perfumes, the 2015 Summer Challenge was to create the scent of the Ambridge Rose flower using certain essential oils, mixed in a floral based alcohol blend. SUMMER AFTERNOON PERFUME was inspired by a quote by the great Henry James: "Summer afternoon, summer afternoon to me those have always been the two most beautiful words in the English language."SUMMER AFTERNOON PERFUME is a floral fragrance without being too sweet, a beautiful fresh powder rose fragrance with just enough spice from a clove bud to make it interesting! Summer Afternoon by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Summer Afternoon was launched in 2015. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate. The fragrance features rose, fir, vanilla, patchouli, cloves, lavender, rose de mai, palisander rosewood, bergamot, peach and geranium.

name: Tea Rose
description: Tea Rose by A Wing & A Prayer Perfumes is a Floral fragrance for women. Tea Rose was launched in 2011. The nose behind this fragrance is Jane Cate.
